case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ARTURO VELAZQUEZ ZAMORA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED OCT-20-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, ARTURO VELAZQUEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMORA, ARTURO VELAZQUEZ $1,042.68 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,122.68 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,042.68 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA, ARTURO VELAZQUEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JHONATHAN HERRADA LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ARTURO VELAZQUEZ ZAMORA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
